title: ANGRAU Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 03 Young Professional II Posts
description: The Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 03 Young Professional II posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their M.Sc. can apply for the ANGRAU Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Here we have mentioned the educational details, age limit, selection proc...
